name: Frontend Architecture
points: Contributed to a centralized design system, making components more reusable and keeping the UI consistent across applications.
Rebuilt a legacy frontend using #vue Vue (Composition API), shaping a more maintainable architecture and pushing test coverage beyond 95%.
Built a micro-frontend setup with Module Federation for 4 interdependent SPAs, reducing duplication and enabling independent deployments.
Designed a schema-driven form engine to power complex multi-step workflows with dynamic validation and extensibility.

name: Performance Optimization
points: Improved Core Web Vitals (LCP) by ~20% by fixing tree-shaking issues, introducing code-splitting, and enabling gzip compression.
Switched the build system from legacy tooling to #vite Vite, cutting down build times and making development feedback loops much faster.

name: Testing & Quality
points: Built a functional testing setup (#playwright Playwright) integrated with CI/CD, cutting down manual regression effort significantly.
Put together an end-to-end API testing framework using #postman Postman/Newman, covering authentication and authorization flows.
Established a high-coverage testing strategy (>95%) to keep large-scale changes stable over time.

name: Cloud & Infrastructure
points: Migrated two applications to #azure Azure, setting up networking, compute, storage, and serverless components end-to-end.
Built a reusable IaC library with #bicep Bicep, along with automated versioning for consistent deployments.
Delivered Azure automation workflows (network provisioning, Key Vault rotation, DevOps pipelines) to reduce manual operational work.
Built a serverless ETL pipeline using Node.js and #function Azure Functions for scalable data processing.
Cut infrastructure costs by ~50% by aligning workloads with the right cloud resources.

name: Backend & Distributed Systems
points: Designed and maintained #spring Spring Boot services, including #kafka Kafka consumers, batch jobs, and REST APIs.
Worked with event-driven and service-based architectures to support scalable backend workflows.

name: Observability
points: Built monitoring and alerting systems (Azure Workspace/Monitor) with metrics dashboards and automated incident triggers, improving visibility and response times.

name: Developer Experience
points: Modernized application's stack with #nodejs Node.js upgrades, Pinia for state management, and Composition API, improving maintainability and developer workflow.
Introduced #docker Docker-based local environments to make complex setups reproducible and easier to work with.
Mentored engineers and ran internal sessions on #react React, #vue Vue, and micro-frontends, helping raise the team's overall capability.

name: Product & UX
points: Created high-fidelity UI mockups and static designs using #figma Figma, enabling faster iteration through continuous feedback with stakeholders.

name: Tooling & Automation
points: Built database migration tooling in #java Java, including a semantic analyzer and an automated documentation generator.
